  "findings": [
    "Unreamed cut ends on EMT conduit",
    "Sharp internal burrs present at conduit joints"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Disassemble affected conduit runs",
    "Ream all cut ends to remove internal burrs",
    "Reassemble and secure conduit run before wire pulling"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Section 358.28(A) explicitly requires all cut ends of EMT to be reamed or otherwise finished to remove rough edges. Unreamed cut ends present a high risk of damaging conductor insulation during wire pulling, which can lead to short circuits, ground faults, or electrical fires.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 358.28(A)",
    "NEC Chapter 9"
  ]
